title: Funky Gooey French Fruits Tarte Tatin
description: A funky twist on the classic French dessert, featuring yuzu-kosho and shio-koji-cure, this tarte tatin is a flexitarian-friendly delight, served on a vibrant talavera plate.

ingredients.name: Apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other tart variety

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, brown sugar, and shio koji.
Add the sliced apples and pears to the bowl and toss to coat with the dry ingredients.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the yuzu kosho and eggs.
Add the butter to the bowl with the yuzu kosho mixture and whisk until smooth.
Pour the wet ingredients over the fruit mixture and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a talavera plate and arrange the fruit in a pattern.
Bake the tarte tatin for 35 minutes, or until the fruit is caramelized and the crust is golden brown.
Remove the tarte tatin from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
